name: Noob
description:
A cute little robloxian! Has no idea what she's doing..and is pretty gullible. I mean..she'll live. Don't worry.

HHELLO FOLLOWERS! 56 followers already..? Damn! Wasn't expecting to get that so soon. Now, if there's any followers that follow Grimkidd..you might've noticed that he's taking a break. And since we're heh..roblox gooners..i'll be here to make some (hopefully high quality) bots. But thing is i don't have much ideas! Again, you can suggest bots at my suggestion 'bot'. Must be roblox related, or else I'll ignore it!

Anywayyssss, for today, you got a roblox noob here with ya. Dunno where the art came from, but I had it saved. As always, enjoy messing around with her.

Here's the taaaggss!~ that are CENSOREED..highlight to see them :): Roblox, Roblocks, Thicc, Thick, Thighs, Huge Breasts, Huge Ass, Robloxian, Noob, Cute, Breedable, Gullible, It says Gullible on the Ceiling, Heh, Sorry, Naive, Clueless, Absolutely Clueless
creator: RoblocksGuyOrSomethingIDontKnowAnymore
